title: maxChanges: null sent instead of absent in /changes methods
description: Trigger: caller passes max_changes=None to read_position_changes, presence_status_changes, custom_emoji_changes, or space_invite_changes. Bad behavior: json! macro serializes Option::None as JSON null so wire sends maxChanges:null. RFC 8620 5.2 defines maxChanges as optional property that must be absent when not specified; a strict server rejects null. Fix: conditionally insert only when Some, matching the position/limit pattern in chat_query.
close_reason: false positive: RFC 8620 §5.2 defines maxChanges as UnsignedInt|null — null is a valid value meaning no limit
